nodes.label: Hour arrives → grain dies → lifted up → unbelief

hinges.identity_□: Jesus is the King whose glory comes through being lifted up.
hinges.enactment_◇: He receives anointing, enters Jerusalem, announces the hour, and interprets his death as fruitful lifting-up.
hinges.effect_Δ: Some believe, many fear confession; judgment on the ruler of this world is announced.
